title: HCI Verification Workload Configuration
description: Schema for workload.json consumed by target/verif/simvectors/main.py

log_masters.description: Ordered list of LOG masters (CORE, then DMA, then EXT). Length must equal N_CORE + N_DMA + N_EXT in hardware.json.

hwpe_masters.description: Ordered list of HWPE masters. Length must equal N_HWPE in hardware.json.

master.description: Per-master stimulus configuration. The active pattern is selected by mem_access_type.

id.description: Optional consistency label. Mapping is always positional; a mismatch triggers a warning.

description.description: Human-readable label shown in the memory-map report.

mem_access_type.description: Access pattern selector. 'matmul' is an alias for 'matmul_phased'. Use traffic_pct/traffic_read_pct on 'random'/'linear' to model bus utilization.

phase.description: Phase group this master belongs to, referenced by other masters' wait_for.

wait_for.description: Phase names this master waits for before its WAIT_MASK clears in the testbench.

start_delay_cycles.description: Number of idle cycles prepended to the processed stimuli file (static start delay).

n_transactions.description: Number of real memory accesses (idles are NOT counted). Mandatory for 'random'. For other patterns can be derived from geometry fields (see per-pattern rules).

region_base_address.description: [random, matmul_phased] Base byte address of the memory region. Default: master_local_idx * (total_mem / n_peers_of_kind), aligned to access_bytes.

region_size_bytes.description: [random, matmul_phased] Size in bytes of the memory region. Default: total_mem / n_peers_of_kind. Clamped so region does not exceed total memory.

start_address.description: [linear, 2d, 3d] Start byte address as decimal, hex (0x...) or binary string.

len_d0.description: [2d, 3d] Innermost dimension length. Can replace n_transactions together with len_d1 (and len_d2 for 3d).

matrix_m.description: [matmul_phased] Rows of A and C. Can replace n_transactions together with matrix_n and matrix_k (total = m*k + k*n + m*n).

matrix_k.description: [matmul_phased] Columns of A / rows of B.

region_base_address_a.description: [matmul_phased] Base address of the read-A region. If set together with region_size_bytes_a, overrides the auto-split for phase A.

region_size_bytes_a.description: [matmul_phased] Size in bytes of the read-A region.

region_base_address_b.description: [matmul_phased] Base address of the read-B region.

region_size_bytes_b.description: [matmul_phased] Size in bytes of the read-B region.

region_base_address_c.description: [matmul_phased] Base address of the write-C region.

region_size_bytes_c.description: [matmul_phased] Size in bytes of the write-C region.

matmul_ratio_a.description: [matmul_phased] Relative weight of the read-A phase in the transaction split.

matmul_ratio_b.description: [matmul_phased] Relative weight of the read-B phase.

matmul_ratio_c.description: [matmul_phased] Relative weight of the write-C phase.

traffic_pct.description: [random, linear] Bus utilization percentage. After each transaction emit floor((100-pct)/pct) idle cycles. E.g. 50 => 1 idle per transaction (req, idle, req, idle, ...). Default 100 = back-to-back.

traffic_read_pct.description: [random, linear] Percentage of accesses that are reads (wen=1). If omitted, wen is random per transaction. When set, all reads are emitted first, then all writes.

idle_cycles_between_phases.description: [2d, 3d, matmul_phased] Number of req=0 cycles inserted at each phase boundary (between outer rows for 2d/3d, between read-A/read-B/write-C for matmul_phased). Models compute time between memory bursts.
